summary: Comprehensive testing of 2% platform service fee feature. All 8 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. The platform fee is correctly calculated and displayed across all touchpoints.

issues: Minor accessibility warning: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (console warning only - not user-facing)

critical_code_review_comments: 2% platform fee calculation is correct: gross_amount * 0.02 = platform_fee
Net amount calculation is correct: gross_amount - platform_fee = net_amount
Platform revenue is tracked in db.platform_revenue collection
Admin stats correctly aggregate platform revenue with total, fee_pct, and payouts_count
Wallet endpoint returns total_platform_fees for payout recipients
CSV export includes 'Frais' column showing platform fees for payout rows
Contract terms include platform_fee_pct: 2 and obligation about 2% fee
seed_data_creation: Test tontines created during payout flow testing with 2 participants each
context_for_next_testing_agent: 2% platform fee feature fully implemented and tested. Key verification points: 1) POST /api/admin/trigger-payout/{tontine_id} returns gross_amount, platform_fee (2%), net_amount, 2) Platform revenue stored in db.platform_revenue, 3) GET /api/admin/stats includes platform_revenue.total, platform_revenue.fee_pct=2, platform_revenue.payouts_count, 4) GET /api/wallet includes total_platform_fees, 5) GET /api/wallet/export CSV has Frais column, 6) Contract terms have platform_fee_pct: 2 and 2% fee obligation text.
passed_tests: ✅ test_admin_trigger_payout_returns_fee_breakdown - Verified payout response contains gross_amount, platform_fee, net_amount
✅ test_admin_stats_includes_platform_revenue - Verified admin stats has platform_revenue with total, fee_pct=2, payouts_count
✅ test_wallet_includes_total_platform_fees - Verified wallet endpoint returns total_platform_fees field
✅ test_wallet_export_csv_includes_platform_fees - Verified CSV export has 'Frais' column for platform fees
✅ test_contract_terms_include_platform_fee - Verified contract terms have platform_fee_pct: 2 and 2% obligation
✅ test_admin_stats_platform_revenue_structure - Verified structure of platform_revenue in admin stats
✅ test_full_payout_flow_with_fee - End-to-end test of payout flow with fee calculation
✅ Admin page shows 'Revenus Plateforme' card with '2% sur X payouts' subtitle
✅ Tontine detail page shows 'Frais Savyn (2%): -XXeur' and 'Net: XXeur'
✅ Marketplace contract dialog includes 'Accepter les frais de service Savyn (2% prélevés sur chaque versement reçu)'
mocked_api_note: Payouts are simulated (MOCKED - no real Lemon Way transfer). Platform fee tracking is real and stored in MongoDB.
rca_of_issue: No issues found - all features working as expected

feature_verification_summary.admin_stats_endpoint: ✅ Returns platform_revenue with total, fee_pct=2, payouts_count
feature_verification_summary.wallet_endpoint: ✅ Returns total_platform_fees for users who received payouts
feature_verification_summary.wallet_csv_export: ✅ CSV includes 'Frais' column showing platform fees
feature_verification_summary.contract_terms: ✅ Includes platform_fee_pct: 2 and 2% fee obligation text
feature_verification_summary.admin_ui_revenue_card: ✅ Shows 'Revenus Plateforme' with total and '2% sur X payouts'
feature_verification_summary.tontine_detail_net_payout: ✅ Shows net payout after 2% fee deduction
feature_verification_summary.contract_dialog_2pct: ✅ Mentions 2% Savyn service fee in obligations
